overview: Coastal Anti-Aging Medical Group is a concierge medical practice providing personalized anti-aging and functional medicine care. Dr. Chong Kim, double board-certified in anti-aging and internal medicine, offers customized treatment plans using functional medicine approaches.
highlights: Concierge medicine with same-day or next-day appointments
IV therapy with NAD+ and custom nutritional therapy
targetAudience: Individuals seeking personalized anti-aging care and longevity medicine beyond traditional medical approaches.
